description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a cylindrical, perforated handguard and a matte black finish. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, with a series of circular ventilation holes along the handguard for cooling. It features a detachable box magazine inserted vertically in front of the trigger guard, and a simple, wireframe folding stock at the rear. The pistol grip is made of a dark, possibly wooden or polymer material, contrasting with the rest of the body. The front and rear iron sights are fixed, and the muzzle is plain with no visible device attached.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun-style rifle with a perforated handguard, wireframe folding stock, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, perforated handguard, wireframe stock, and box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, handguard ventilation holes, and wire stock outline.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, trigger, and the other side of the handguard and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wireframe stock and the back of the pistol grip.
